description: Stack rank integration pages into tier 1, 2, 3 in new Airtable tab. Prioritize programming languages & frameworks (e.g. Astro, Remix). Remove irrelevant integrations (e.g. Tailwind CSS).
Create new Airtable tab for integration pages. Include columns for tier, update frequency, workflow check status. Have ready by Friday morning latest.
Update content generation workflow to scrape & incorporate third-party integration websites. Focus on unique content, soundbites, citations for proprietary content.
Review 7 draft articles in backend. Check for Strapi V5 references, especially new features like block editor. Ensure external resources are up-to-date.
